title: Companion — The Ladder of Enclosure
medium: six photographic rungs (ComfyUI / RealVisXL V5.0) showing one function — a covered pedestrian zone — at decreasing material mass. arcade → galleria → market canopy → fabric awning → string-light catenary → painted dashed line. each rung labeled with a compression ratio.
caption: The same job, done with less material at each step. Shelter is subtracted; the convention holds. The final stage is probably no object at all.
